essence: Designs interfaces and behaviours that let humans and robots collaborate safely and effectively.

identity.title: Human‑Robot Interaction Specialist
identity.summary: Focuses on usability, safety, and social aspects of robot behaviour to ensure intuitive and trustworthy human collaboration.

salary.notes: Roles combining HRI with UX or robotics engineering are highly valued.

qualifications: Background in HCI, robotics, psychology, or design
Experience prototyping robot behaviours and interfaces
Knowledge of safety standards and human factors
Strong user research and testing skills

lifestyle.description: Combines lab studies, prototyping, and field trials. Regular user testing and cross‑disciplinary collaboration with engineers and designers.

habits: Runs user studies and usability tests
Prototypes interaction patterns and safety behaviours
Analyses human responses and refines designs
Works with engineers to implement interaction logic
